docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-13-2019 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00- SERVED JUN-14-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LOUIE, DAVID

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-13-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-13-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF ELIAS GEORGOPOULOS IS PRESENT. WITNESS MONICA GEORGOPOULOS TESTIFIES ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT DAVID LOUI IS PRESENT. WITNESSES ALFREDO NARDISAY, LAWRENCE MANU & CHRISTINE CRESCI TESTIFY ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY GEORGOPOULOS, ELIAS AS TO DEFENDANT LOUIE, DAVID ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-13-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GEORGOPOULOS, ELIAS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LOUIE, DAVID PLAINTIFF FAILS TO ESTABLISH HIS BURDEN OF PROOF THAT DEFENDANT ACTED WITH INTENT TO INJURE PLAINTIFF OR THAT DEFENDANT ACTED NEGLIGENTLY TOWARD PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED NOV-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
